name: RESOURCES CONNECTION, INC.
business: Resources Connection, Inc. (RGP) is a professional services firm providing on-demand talent, consulting, and outsourced services to businesses undergoing transformation, compliance, or strategic initiatives. They serve over 1,600 clients globally, including 88% of the Fortune 100 as of May 2025.

exposures.sentence: On-Demand Talent this segment provides businesses with a go-to source for bringing in experts to fill resource gaps when they need them.
Deep functional and/or technical experts who can assess clients project needs and customize solutions to meet those needs; ... including: ... Data privacy and security.
Transformations Finance transformation Digital transformation Supply chain management Cloud migration Data design and analytics.
